display.purpose: Page titles only. Used once per page at most.

headline.purpose: Section headings within multi-step flows and wizard step titles.

title.purpose: Card headings, modal titles, form group labels.

body.purpose: All descriptive text, wizard content, field descriptions. Max 65ch.

label.purpose: Section category headers and taxonomy labels only. Always uppercase.

mono.purpose: Machine-generated strings only: submission IDs, resource group names, ARM tags, proof artifact text.

shadows.name: structural
shadows.purpose: Modals only. Signals complete escape from the page layer.

shadows.name: floating
shadows.purpose: Toasts and dropdown menus. Ephemeral floating UI.

motion.name: ease-out-expo
motion.purpose: Page entry animations (420ms) and mobile menu animations. Exponential ease-out; no bounce.

motion.name: ease-out-standard
motion.purpose: Component state transitions: color, background, border (150ms). Hover, focus, active.

motion.name: page-entry
motion.purpose: Staggered fade-up on route entry. Each zone delayed 80ms from the previous.

breakpoints.name: sm
breakpoints.purpose: Mobile menu collapses to hamburger below this point.

breakpoints.name: md
breakpoints.purpose: Layout padding expands from px-6 to px-8.

breakpoints.name: lg
breakpoints.purpose: Max content width cap at max-w-7xl.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main call-to-action. Used for Deploy, Browse Templates, and step advancement in wizards.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; height: 44px; padding: 0 24px; background-color: #4a9be0; color: #ffffff; border: none; border-radius: 9999px; font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms ease-out; text-decoration: none; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background-color: #5aaef0; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #4a9be0; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; pointer-events: none; }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Alternative action. Transparent fill with a subtle border. Same pill shape as primary.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; height: 44px; padding: 0 24px; background-color: transparent; color: #e0eaf8; border: 1px solid rgba(44, 127, 212, 0.25); border-radius: 9999px; font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms ease-out; text-decoration: none; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background-color: #375577; } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #4a9be0; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-secondary:disabled { opacity: 0.5; pointer-events: none; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Tertiary action. Muted text at rest; only activates visually on interaction.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; height: 44px; padding: 0 24px; background-color: transparent; color: rgba(175, 210, 245, 0.82); border: none; border-radius: 9999px; font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms ease-out, color 150ms ease-out; text-decoration: none; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background-color: #375577; color: #e0eaf8; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #4a9be0; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-ghost:disabled { opacity: 0.5; pointer-events: none; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Standard content container. Used for templates, resources, and information groupings.
components.html:
Storage Account

Provision a Blob storage account in Southeast Asia with EPF policy tags applied automatically.
components.css: .ds-card { background-color: #2c4262; border: 1px solid rgba(44, 127, 212, 0.25); border-radius: 6px; padding: 24px; transition: background-color 150ms ease-out, border-color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-card-title { font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600; color: #e0eaf8; margin: 0 0 8px 0; } .ds-card-body { font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 400; color: rgba(175, 210, 245, 0.82); line-height: 1.6; margin: 0; }

components.name: Badges
components.description: Status indicators. Tinted semantic colors at 15% opacity. Used for deployment status, region labels, and resource type tags.
components.html: Southeast AsiaSucceededExpires soonPolicy blockedStorage
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; border-radius: 9999px; padding: 2px 10px; font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; white-space: nowrap; } .ds-badge-default { background-color: #375577; color: #e0eaf8; } .ds-badge-accent { background-color: rgba(74, 155, 224, 0.15); color: #4a9be0; } .ds-badge-success { background-color: rgba(34, 197, 94, 0.15); color: #22c55e; } .ds-badge-warning { background-color: rgba(245, 158, 11, 0.15); color: #f59e0b; } .ds-badge-error { background-color: rgba(239, 68, 68, 0.15); color: #ef4444; }

components.name: Navigation Bar
components.description: Fixed top navigation. Logo + wordmark left, nav links center-right, user avatar right.
components.html:
Sandbox
HomeTemplates
components.css: .ds-navbar { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; height: 64px; padding: 0 32px; background-color: #2c4262; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(44, 127, 212, 0.25); width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; } .ds-nav-logo { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; } .ds-nav-wordmark { font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600; color: #e0eaf8; text-decoration: none; } .ds-nav-links { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 32px; } .ds-nav-link { position: relative; font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; color: rgba(175, 210, 245, 0.82); text-decoration: none; transition: color 150ms ease-out; padding-bottom: 4px; } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: #e0eaf8; } .ds-nav-link-active { color: #e0eaf8; } .ds-nav-link-active::after { content: ''; position: absolute; bottom: -2px; left: 0; right: 0; height: 2px; background-color: #2b7fd4; border-radius: 1px; }

components.name: Toast Notification
components.description: Ephemeral feedback. Bottom-right, 5s auto-dismiss. Three semantic variants.
components.html:
Deployment submitted successfully.
Deployment failed. Check ARM status.
components.css: .ds-toast { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; border-radius: 12px; border: 1px solid rgba(44, 127, 212, 0.25); background-color: #375577; padding: 12px 16px; box-shadow: 0 10px 15px -3px rgba(0,0,0,0.1), 0 4px 6px -4px rgba(0,0,0,0.1); max-width: 360px; } .ds-toast-icon { width: 20px; height: 20px; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-toast-icon-success { color: #22c55e; } .ds-toast-icon-error { color: #ef4444; } .ds-toast-icon-warning { color: #f59e0b; } .ds-toast-text { font-family: 'IBM Plex Sans', system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 400; color: #e0eaf8; flex: 1; line-height: 1.5; } .ds-toast-dismiss { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: none; border: none; cursor: pointer; padding: 2px; border-radius: 4px; color: rgba(175, 210, 245, 0.82); transition: color 150ms ease-out; margin-left: 8px; } .ds-toast-dismiss:hover { color: #e0eaf8; }

components.name: Proof Artifact Block
components.description: Monospaced deployment proof shown in ConfirmModal. The only surface where IBM Plex Mono dominates. Copyable as plain text for HOD approval email.
components.html:
SANDBOX DEPLOYMENT PROOF
Submission ID : a1b2c3d4-e5f6-7890
Submitted By  : Amirul Haziq (amirul@epf.gov.my)
Date/Time     : 1 May 2026, 10:34 AM
Mode          : Template
Target RG     : rg-storage-account-a1b2c3
Status        : accepted
components.css: .ds-proof { background-color: #22324a; border: 1px solid rgba(44, 127, 212, 0.25); border-radius: 6px; overflow: hidden; } .ds-proof-header { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding: 10px 16px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(44, 127, 212, 0.25); background-color: #2c4262; } .ds-proof-title { font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.75rem; font-weight: 500; color: rgba(175, 210, 245, 0.82); letter-spacing: 0.05em; } .ds-proof-copy { display: flex; align-items: center; background: none; border: none; cursor: pointer; padding: 4px; border-radius: 4px; color: rgba(175, 210, 245, 0.82); transition: color 150ms ease-out; } .ds-proof-copy:hover { color: #4a9be0; } .ds-proof-body { font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.8125rem; font-weight: 400; color: #e0eaf8; line-height: 1.7; padding: 16px; margin: 0; white-space: pre-wrap; overflow-x: auto; }

narrative.overview:
Sandbox IAC is an internal tool for non-technical EPF staff who need to provision Azure infrastructure without understanding it. The interface plays the role of a knowledgeable colleague who has pre-arranged the process: questions are asked in the right order, options are scoped to what is relevant for this step, and feedback is honest and immediate. The experience reduces cognitive load by sequencing complexity, not hiding it.

The system is dark. Not because tools look cool dark, but because the physical scene demands it: a project manager in a modern office environment opening this tool alongside Azure Portal and their planning software. Dark surfaces reduce eye strain, align with developer-adjacent tooling expectations, and let the UI recede so that the user's decisions occupy the visual foreground.

The aesthetic is deliberately restrained. IBM Plex Sans and IBM Plex Mono establish technical credibility without coldness. The azure-blue palette anchors the tool in the Azure ecosystem without mimicking it. Tonal surface layering communicates depth without shadows. The sky-accent blue appears only where the interface is asking for action.
keyCharacteristics: Tonal depth over shadow hierarchy: three surface layers, no card shadows
Pill-shaped interactive affordances: buttons and badges are round; containers are not
IBM Plex Mono reserved exclusively for machine-generated strings
Staggered fade-up animations on page entry; state transitions only on components
Subtle 48px grid background pattern reinforces the infrastructure register

rules.name: The Clarity Rule
rules.body: Sky Accent (#4a9be0) appears only on interactive and navigational elements. It is never used decoratively. Its presence means 'something you can do.'

rules.name: The Tonal Grid Rule
rules.body: There are exactly three surface layers: Foundation, Surface, Elevated. No surface sits on more than one layer. Nested cards are forbidden.

rules.name: The Weight Hierarchy Rule
rules.body: Every typographic level must differ from its neighbor by at least one font-weight step AND at least 1.25x in size. Flat hierarchies — same size, different color — are prohibited.

rules.name: The Mono Boundary Rule
rules.body: IBM Plex Mono is reserved for machine-generated strings. It never appears in headings, body copy, labels, or button text.

rules.name: The Tonal Depth Rule
rules.body: Depth lives in surface color, not shadows. If you are reaching for a box-shadow on a card or section container, use the next tonal surface layer instead.

rules.name: The Shadow Exception Rule
rules.body: Shadows are permitted only on elements that physically float above the page: modals, toasts, dropdown menus, popovers. Every other surface is flat at rest.

dos: Do use tonal layering (Foundation to Surface to Elevated) to communicate containment and depth.
Do use border-radius 9999px exclusively for interactive pill elements: buttons and badges.
Do use IBM Plex Mono for all machine-generated strings: submission IDs, resource group names, ARM tags, proof artifact content.
Do write Label-level text in uppercase with 0.075em letter-spacing for genuine taxonomy.
Do keep body copy under 65 characters per line.
Do use semantic badge colors at 15% opacity background with full-opacity text.
Do animate with ease-out exponential curves (cubic-bezier(0.22, 1, 0.36, 1)). State transitions are 150ms. Page entry animations are 420ms.
Do scope shadows to floating UI only: modals and toasts.
donts: Don't use border-left or border-right greater than 1px as a colored stripe on cards or list items.
Don't use background-clip: text with a gradient. All text is a single solid color.
Don't use glassmorphism decoratively. backdrop-blur appears only on the scrolled navbar.
Don't invent a fourth surface layer. Foundation, Surface, and Elevated are the complete vocabulary.
Don't apply box-shadows to cards or section containers.
Don't use sharp corners or fully square buttons. The pill shape is the deliberate affordance signal.
Don't use IBM Plex Mono for UI copy, headings, or labels.
Don't build screens that feel like a boxy SharePoint intranet.
Don't build screens that feel like AWS Console — overwhelming options, dense navigation.
Don't use flashy SaaS patterns: gradient fills, glassmorphism cards, or hero metrics.
Don't use neon accents, cyberpunk color treatments, or glowing dark-mode aesthetics.
Don't build identical card grids: same-sized cards with icon + heading + body text, repeated endlessly.
